warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Northern Sarawak and Sabah until 1:00PM; Wednesday, 1 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Sarawak Utara dan Sabah sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Rabu, 1 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, northwestern part of Condore, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu and Sulawesi until 1:00PM; Wednesday, 1 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, barat laut Condore, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu dan Sulawesi sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Rabu, 1 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Pendang and Kuala Muda); and  Penang  until 2:00PM; Wednesday, 1 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Pendang dan Kuala Muda); dan  Pulau Pinang  sehingga 2:00 petang; Rabu, 1 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Category:  Tropical Depression Advisory (NN)                  Time of Observation:  08:00, 01 July 2026                  Location:  Latitude 13.7 North and Longitude 118.9 East                  Movement:  Northwest 20 km/h.                  Maximum wind speed:  56 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 201 km Southwest of Olongapo City, Philippines.                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 790 km Northeast of Kudat.                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Lekukan Tropika (NN)                  Masa Pencerapan:  08:00, 01 Julai 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 13.7 Utara dan Longitud 118.9 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Ke arah Barat Laut dengan kelajuan 20 km/j.                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  56 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 201 km ke Barat Daya Olongapo City, Filipina.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 790 km ke Timur Laut Kudat.                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.
